instructions: Lift the tray off the table using both hands.
Use both grippers to pick up the breakfast tray and raise it.
Grasp the tray with both hands and lift it above the table.
Bimanually lift the tray from the cabinet surface.
Pick up the tray with both arms, keeping it steady.
Grab the tray on both sides and raise it off the table.
Using both end-effectors, lift the breakfast tray upward.
Carefully lift the tray with two hands so it clears the surface.
Hold the tray with both grippers and elevate it from the table.
Raise the breakfast tray off the counter using a two-handed grasp.
